notes:
SOUNDS. All three ids are plain net.minecraft.sounds.SoundEvents fields (verified via javap on the 26.2 common-deobf jar) — pass them straight into level.playSound, no .value() (unlike the NOTE_BLOCK_* holders). castSound REPLACES the current AMETHYST_BLOCK_CHIME@vol1.0/pitch0.5: same iconic chime, but lifted to a light register, dropped to vol 0.4, and given the pitch jitter it currently lacks (fixed 0.5 = 500 identical bongs = the fatigue trap). pitchBase 1.35 +-0.15 -> range ~1.2-1.5, a soft short tink that layers into a pleasant wind-chime wash at 4 casts/sec instead of a drone. empoweredCastSound is a 2-layer stack (max 2, honored): the SAME bright chime so it is audibly the same spell, plus a low AMETHYST_BLOCK_RESONATE bloom at pitch 0.85 that ONLY the empowered cast has — that deep resonance under the tinkle is the eyes-closed tell. Keep the resonate layer's jitter tiny so the low bloom stays recognizable. hitSound is NEW (MISSILE currently plays nothing on impact): a soft AMETHYST_BLOCK_HIT tick, vol 0.5, well jittered, so hits feel like they connect without adding a fourth loud event to the spam. If any event still feels busy, cut hitSound first, then halve castSound volume.

TRAIL. The normal trail is deliberately near-nothing: one small dim-violet DUST every OTHER tick, zero speed, a hair of spread. This is NOT the old always-on white END_ROD stream the author removed — the mote's white-hot heart is the glow, the dust is just a faint dotted thread so a fast projectile doesn't look like it is teleporting. It can be dialed to everyNTicks 3, or to [] (empty) entirely, if even this is too much; the sprite carries the look on its own. The empoweredTrail is the richer signature (affordable because empowered is only every 8th/4th cast): brighter violet dust EVERY tick + a sparse white END_ROD sparkle, echoing the current 'empowered keeps the trail' behavior but tinted into the violet family.

SPRITES / MODEL. missile.png and empowered.png are 16x16 item textures for a new magic-missile item (and its empowered model) — swap the projectile's look ItemStack (currently Items.AMETHYST_SHARD in buildMissile) to the new item; empowered carries the empowered model. IMPORTANT: empowered.png is authored at the SAME 16px footprint as normal — do NOT pre-enlarge it, because SpellProjectileRenderer already renders empowered at 1.5x. Its extra reach comes from being an 8-point star, not a scaled bitmap.

CAPSTONES. SEEKER (homing): reuse missile.png; bump ITS trail to the empoweredTrail's first line only (violet DUST #b38ef3, everyNTicks 1) so the homing arc is legible as it curves — no sound change. LANCE (piercing): keep the travelling ring mechanic (lanceRing), but for family cohesion recolor its END_ROD points to DUST #b38ef3 scale 1.0; keeping them white END_ROD is an acceptable fallback if you want the AOE ring to read as a brighter/contrasting hazard. ECHO twins use the plain normal sprite+trail as today.
